content:
# Best AI Code Tools for Freelance Developers in 2026

Freelance developers know that time is money. AI code tools help you write code faster, debug easier, and deliver projects sooner!

Explore our [[link:/category/Code|Code category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]: The Industry Standard

[[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] is the most widely adopted AI coding assistant, and for good reason.

It integrates seamlessly with all major editors and suggests code as you type.

### Why Copilot for Freelancers?
- **Works in all major editors**: VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim
- **Understands context**: Suggests code based on your project
- **Free for students**: Perfect if you're learning

---

## [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]]: The AI-First IDE

[[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] is an IDE built from the ground up for AI assistance.

It offers chat-based coding, code refactoring, and powerful AI features that feel magical.

### Cursor Highlights
- **Chat with your codebase**: Ask questions about your code
- **AI refactoring**: Improve your code with AI assistance
- **Seamless integration**: Works with your existing Git repos

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price | Free Plan |
|------|----------|-------|-----------|
| [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] | Everyday coding | $10/mo | Yes (students) |
| [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] | AI-first IDE | $20/mo | Yes (limited) |
| [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]] | Testing & quality | $19/mo | Yes |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Everyday coding**: Start with [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]
- **Deep AI integration**: Try [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] IDE
- **Testing focus**: Use [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]] for test generation

Ready to code faster and deliver more projects? Try these tools today!

For more insights, check out our guide: Best AI Coding Assistants 2026
